title: Indochina, Traces of a Mother
original_title: Indochine, sur les traces d'une mère
overview: Indochina: Through the story of Christophe, a 58 year old Afro-Vietnamese man, the film tells the story of African colonial soldiers fighting for the French in Indochina.
